_meta.source: perks/weapons: darkanddarker.wiki.spellsandguns.com/Cleric; base stats & skills: api.darkerdb.com/v1/classes (merged by scripts/build-classes.mjs)
_meta.note: Spell system (memory/casting) is out of scope for the stat engine; spell selection skills appear as skills only.
_meta.patch_level: Perk/skill roster merged from darkerdb API dump of Patch 6.12 / EA Season 10 (2026-07-21). New 6.12 entries use API descriptions (numeric values blank until the wiki catches up).

name: Cleric
perk_slot_rule: 1 slot + 1 additional slot every 5 levels; 4 slots at level 15 (max)

perks.name: Advanced Healer
perks.effect: +5 Outgoing Magical Healing Add

perks.name: Aura of Awe
perks.effect: Reduces the action speed of enemies within m by 7%.

perks.name: Banishing Touch
perks.effect: When hitting an undead or demon enemy with a melee or ranged attack, has a 5% chance to stun them for 1 second.

perks.name: Blood Tithe
perks.effect: Your magical healing increases by 2 for every 10% of health you lose.

perks.name: Blunt Weapon Mastery
perks.effect: While using a mace: +10% Physical Power Bonus

perks.name: Brewmaster
perks.effect: Converts the drunken debuff into a buff; +10 Strength while drunk

perks.name: Divine Echo
perks.effect: While in a dungeon, Replaces your Resurrection spell with Miracle. When cast, instantly revives all dead allies at their current location. Miracle cannot be recharged.

perks.name: Faithfulness
perks.effect: +15% Divine Power Bonus; divine hits slow enemies

perks.name: Heretics Brand
perks.effect: When you deal divine magic damage, reduce the target’s spell casting speed by 30% for 2 seconds and prevent them from entering stealth or invisibility.

perks.name: Holy Aura
perks.effect: +15 Armor Rating and +15 Magical Resistance to self and allies within 6m

perks.name: Holy Water
perks.effect: Drinking removes curses and harmful effects

perks.name: Kindness
perks.effect: Healing another also heals you for 30% of the spell's total heal

perks.name: Over Healing
perks.effect: Excess healing converts to temporary bonus health (up to 20% of max)

perks.name: Pain Offering
perks.effect: When you take damage, heal allies within m for 3% of the damage taken.

perks.name: Perseverance
perks.effect: All incoming damage reduced by 2 Physical and 2 Magical Absolute Reduction

perks.name: Protection from Evil
perks.effect: -30% Debuff Duration on self

perks.name: Requiem
perks.effect: Faster resurrection with reduced HP penalty

perks.name: Sacred Flame
perks.effect: When a divine attack is successful, apply sacred flame to the target for 2 seconds. When sacred flame reaches 3 stacks, it detonates, dealing 10(1.0) divine magical damage.

perks.name: Stigmata
perks.effect: Lose 1 health every 2 seconds, but gain 15% spell casting speed and 5 magical healing.

perks.name: Undead Slaying
perks.effect: +20% Undead Race Damage Bonus

skills.name: Divine Protection
skills.effect: Gain physical damage reduction for seconds. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Holy Purification
skills.effect: After channeling for 1.5 seconds, deal divine magical damage to all undead monsters within a 7.5m radius around you. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Judgement
skills.effect: After channeling for 1 seconds, deal divine magical damage to a target and reduce their move speed bonus by for seconds. Once the channel begins on a target, crosshair targeting is no longer required. This spell has a 5m range and will fail if the target goes out of range. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Smite
skills.effect: Deal an additional divine magical damage to all enemies you hit within seconds. Only when melee attacking. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Spell Memory I
skills.effect: Gain the ability to memorize spells to use in the dungeon.

skills.name: Spell Memory II
skills.effect: Gain the ability to memorize additional spells to use in the dungeon.

skills.name: Barefoot Pilgrimage
skills.effect: For 12 seconds, you losing all armor rating from equipped gear (retaining only base armor rating). In return, casting speed is increased by 20%, magical healing by 25%, and debuff duration bonus is reduced by 50%. Cooldown: 90 seconds

skills.name: Confession
skills.effect: Remove all harmful poison and curse effects from the target and heal 5 per effect removed. Cooldown: 60 seconds

skills.name: Excommunication
skills.effect: Excommunicates the target. For 8 seconds, the target’s divine magic resistance is reduced by 25% and they cannot receive magical healing. Cooldown: 45 seconds

skills.name: Vow of Silence
skills.effect: Unable to cast spells for 6 seconds, but gain a stack of Penance every second.Penance: Increases the effectiveness of magical bonus by 10% and is consumed upon using a divine attack or spell. Cooldown: 32 seconds
